title: wyedytowalem projekt - dodalem wiele zdjec w roznych lokacjach (przy roznych obiektach) przy probie

criteria.description: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx handleFileChange calls POST /api/files for each selected photo and dispatches a string matching /^\/api\/files\/[a-f0-9-]+$/ as photoDataUrl — never a data:image base64 string
criteria.how_to_verify: Read ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx: confirm dispatch payload contains the fileId URL string returned from uploadFile.mutateAsync, not the result of compressImage directly

criteria.description: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx imports and calls useUploadFile from @/hooks/useProjects and useDocument from @/lib/editor-context to obtain docState.projectId
criteria.how_to_verify: Read ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx: imports section and hook call sites both present

criteria.description: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx contains a local helper function (e.g. dataUrlToFile) that converts a base64 data URL string to a File object for upload
criteria.how_to_verify: Read ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx: function exists and is called between compressImage and uploadFile.mutateAsync

criteria.description: useExport.ts toDataUrl helper branch for '/api/files/' strings uses fetch(content) followed by FileReader.readAsDataURL, identical in structure to the existing 'blob:' branch
criteria.how_to_verify: Read useExport.ts handleExportProject: toDataUrl contains an else-if (or combined condition) for content.startsWith('/api/files/')

criteria.description: The existing 'blob:' branch in useExport.ts toDataUrl is not modified
criteria.how_to_verify: Read useExport.ts: blob: handling block is unchanged from current implementation

criteria.description: Photos with legacy base64 data URL values still render correctly in the gallery (backward compat: img src accepts both data: URLs and /api/files/ paths)
criteria.how_to_verify: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx img src={photo} is unchanged — no conditional rendering based on URL type
